videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: The Boxed RPG Special!
videos.description:
STOP PLAYING RPGs FROM BOOKS. Story games were not supposed to have rules longer than actual stories. "What are the effects of a night's rest? Let me check the index" - Statements dreamed up by the utterly deranged. They have played us for absolute fools

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos (and lots more!) at https://www.patreon.com/qquest

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

PDFs of all the games in this special can be found here (shoutout to Jamie from our Discord):

https://bullypulpitgames.itch.io/desperation
https://possible-worlds-games.itch.io/tacklebox
https://possible-worlds-games.itch.io/better-strangers
http://blackarmada.com/lovecraftesque
https://heartofthedeernicorn.com/product/city-of-winter/?v=7885444af42e

0:00:00 - The future is Box
0:04:39 - Review: Desperation
0:13:10 - Review: Tacklebox
0:21:17 - boooooobs
0:24:14 - Secret miniature 5th review
0:25:44 - Review: Lovecraftesque
0:36:56 - Review: City of Winter

videos.label: Play to Find Out, S3E1: Nobilis
videos.description:
In the third season of Play to Find Out, the actual play where Quinns GMs notorious old TTRPGs from history, it's time for a brave attempt at 1999 role-playing game Nobilis. A game of warring gods, endless revelations about how the world "really" works, and... no dice at all.

Join the Quinns Quest Patreon to hear the rest of this season, see our play materials, and submerge yourself in other Exclusive Content
https://patreon.com/qquest

Podcast feeds:
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/play-to-find-out/id1804356815
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/5hteYTS1d4KLGtCrF88HMr
Pocket Casts: https://pca.st/g3lsknpc
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.com/podcasts/7d2f7123-9e67-4c0d-96f7-73740fdc899e/play-to-find-out
Castbox: https://castbox.fm/vh/6532883 

Credits:
Performed by Quinns, Emily Johnson and Rob Morgan.
Editing and sound design by Brian Flaherty of Many Sided Media.
We use the name Play to Find Out with permission from Meg and Vincent Baker.

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: Triangle Agency!
videos.description:
Triangle Agency by Caleb Zane Huett and Sean Ireland is a comedy. It's a drama. It's postmodern. It's magical realist. It's subversive. It's honest. And it even caused a conflict between Quinns and his players. This game is SO MUCH

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos (and SO MUCH more!) at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Triangle Agency can be purchased at https://shop.hauntedtable.games/

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

0:00:00 - Welcome to the Agency!
0:13:46 - Quinns has a little rap
0:16:46 - Part 1: Mundane Adventures
0:36:19 - Part 2: Adventurous Mundanity
0:46:50 - Part 3:  S E C R E T S
0:55:43 - So, should you buy it?

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: Mythic Bastionland!
videos.description:
Mythic Bastionland by Chris McDowall and illustrator Alec Sorenson does the impossible. In a hobby packed tight with lightweight fantasy TTRPGs, it actually stands out and it got Quinns excited.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos (and lots more!) at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Hex Kit can be purchased at https://cone.itch.io/

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

0:00:00 - What is Mythic Bastionland
0:23:22 - Quinns gets in his armchair
0:26:14 - What the game feels like for players
0:36:41 - What the game is like for GMs
0:45:22 - Quinns talks about COMBAT for AGES
0:58:17 - It's finished!

videos.label: Play to Find Out, S2E1: Toon
videos.description:
It's the second season of Play to Find Out, and Quinns and his naive test subjects try 1984 role-playing game Toon! An RPG of playing cartoon characters where the golden rule is "Act before you think."

Join the Quinns Quest Patreon to hear the rest of this season, see our play materials, and submerge yourself in other Exclusive Content
https://patreon.com/qquest

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: Delta Green & Impossible Landscapes
videos.description:
Delta Green: Impossible Landscapes is weird, imperfect, not for everybody and pitch dark. Also? It has a strong claim for being the greatest RPG campaign ever written. Detective Quinns is on the case.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

0:00:00 - Prologue~
0:01:22 - Act 1: Reviewing Delta Green
0:35:20 - ~Intermezzo~
0:38:44 - Act 2: Reviewing Impossible Landscapes

videos.label: Play to Find Out, S1E1: Skyrealms of Jorune
videos.description:
In this first season of Play to Find Out, Quinns and his all-star team tackle accursed 1984 fantasy role-playing game Skyrealms of Jorune. Expect thriddles, giggits, woffens, and enough moon energy to get a pibble thisting.

Join the Quinns Quest Patreon to hear the rest of this season, see our play materials, and submerge yourself in other Private Content
https://patreon.com/qquest

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: There's a Skating RPG, and it's a Masterpiece
videos.description:
Slugblaster is an RPG that feels like it was sent back in time from a brighter, cooler future. Everybody, it's past time we stopped playing Elven Rangers and started playing a gang of teenagers who've made guns in their bedrooms.

https://www.patreon.com/qquest

Buy Slugblaster (digital) here: https://wilkies.itch.io/slugblaster
Buy Slugblaster (physical) here: https://www.myth.works/pages/slugblaster

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

0:00:00 - Intro: Your Nephew's Nards
0:00:49 - Part 1: What is Slugblaster?
0:14:47 - Part 2: S.Y.S.T.E.M.S.
0:28:50 - Intermission: We are all bad at stories
0:32:23 - Part 3: Can I just roll some dice please
0:36:39 - Part 4: The rest
0:43:16 - Outro: The End of Quinns Quest... or is it?

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: This Sci-Fi RPG Changes Everything
videos.description:
Mothership might be the coolest, vaguely-countercultural RPG since Vampire: The Masquerade. But is it GOOD? Let's find out.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Buy Mothership here: https://www.tuesdayknightgames.com/pages/mothership-rpg

Edited by Jennifer Bingham.

0:00:00 - Prologue~
0:05:21 - Part 1: Packaging (it's GOOD)
0:13:27 - Part 2: Rules (they're GOOD)
0:23:14 - Part 3: Content (it's GOOD)
0:31:41 - Part 4: Complaints (sorry)
0:41:53 - Part 5: What to buy?

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: This RPG Makes Monsters Scary Again
videos.description:
Call of Cthulhu? Why don't you stop calling Cthulhu for a change, give the guy a rest, and take a look at Vaesen instead.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Buy Vaesen here: https://freeleaguepublishing.com/games/vaesen/

videos.label: The chill debrief after our Citizen Sleeper 2 Actual Play
videos.description:
Thanks so much for watching this experiment, everybody! If you've not seen the Actual Play video itself, you'll find it at https://youtu.be/SCP7Pf12xcU

Wishlist Citizen Sleeper 2 here: https://bit.ly/CS2Quinns
Learn more about CBR+PNK (the system we used) here: https://emanoelmelo.itch.io/cbrpnk-core
Read about Script Change (our safety tool) here: https://briebeau.com/thoughty/script-change/

videos.label: Tabletop roleplaying in the world of Citizen Sleeper 2!
videos.description:
This project was an entirely unexpected collaboration between Quinns Quest and Jump Over the Age. Do you enjoy seeing Actual Play on Quinns Quest? Let me know in the comments!

Wishlist Citizen Sleeper 2 here: https://bit.ly/CS2Quinns
Learn more about CBR+PNK (the system we used) here: https://emanoelmelo.itch.io/cbrpnk-core
Read about Script Change (our safety tool) here: https://briebeau.com/thoughty/script-change/

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: The Greatest Dungeon of All Time?
videos.description:
Heart is an TTRPG that asks "What if a dungeon was all about *you?*" If that sounds bleak, you don't know the half of it.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Buy Heart here: https://rowanrookanddecard.com/product/heart-the-city-beneath-rpg/
Pre-order Dagger in the Heart here: https://dagger-in-the-heart.backerkit.com/hosted_preorders

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: Stop Playing Wizards and Get In These Mechs
videos.description:
Lancer is a TTRPG that asks "Haven't we killed enough goblins?" and "Don't you like these mechs?" and the answer to both of those questions is "YES" in capital letters.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
For .pdfs of Lancer, head to the itch.io page: https://massif-press.itch.io/
To pre-order physical copies of the core book, head to the Massif Press site: https://massifpress.com/shop

videos.label: Quinns Quest Reviews: Your Favourite New Fantasy RPG
videos.description:
The Wildsea is the best, boldest new fantasy TTRPG in years, and Quinns is here to tell you why.

Support Quinns Quest and get extra videos at https://www.patreon.com/qquest
Felix Isaacs on itch.io https://felixisaacs.itch.io/
Wildsea publisher page https://myth.works/en-gb/collections/the-wildsea-homepage
